inputs.label: Generator Rated Power
inputs.businessContext: Maximum continuous electrical power output of the generator as specified by the manufacturer.

inputs.label: Load Factor
inputs.businessContext: Average percentage of rated power at which the generator operates during the period.

inputs.label: Operating Hours per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of hours the generator is expected to run per day.

inputs.label: Fuel Consumption Rate
inputs.businessContext: Volume of fuel consumed per kilowatt-hour of electrical energy generated, at the given load factor.

inputs.label: Fuel Density
inputs.businessContext: Mass density of the fuel (e.g., diesel ~0.85 kg/L).

inputs.label: Generator Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the generator in converting mechanical input to electrical output.
